### 🐛 Bug Description

### 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### 🤔 Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

### 📸 Screenshots or Console Error Logs
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste developer console error logs to help explain your problem. -->

### 🖥️ Desktop / Mobile Environment
 - OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, iOS, Android]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
 - Version: [e.g. 124.0]

### ℹ️ Additional Context
